title: October 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}
'''October 15''' is the 288th day of the year (289th in leap years). 77 days remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1923|1923]] – [[Vince Colletta]] is born.
*[[1930s#1933|1933]] – [[Claude Woolman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Dominic West]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Jeff Moon]] dies.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 138|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 138]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 103|''Star Wars'' 103]] published.
*[[1990]] – [[Vincent Martella]] is born.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Luke's Fate]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Larry Ward]] dies.
*[[2008]] – [[The Clone Wars 2|''The Clone Wars'' 2]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars Insider 113|''Star Wars Insider'' 113]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[The Academy]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2010 – ''[[Timeline 10: The Exar Kun War]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2011]] – [[Grant Feely]] is born.
*2011 – ''[[Star Wars: The Blueprints]]'' released.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Five|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' The Complete Season Five]] released.
*2013 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Seasons 1-5 Collector's Edition|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' Seasons 1-5 Collector's Edition]] released.
*2013 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars 3-Pack|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' 3-Pack]] released.
*[[2016]] – "[[Hera's Heroes]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – ''[[The Marvel Art of Star Wars]]''
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]'' soundtracks released.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Mace Windu: The Glass Abyss]]'' published.
*2024 – [[Mace Windu: The Glass Abyss (audiobook)|''Mace Windu: The Glass Abyss'' audiobook]] released.
*2024 – [[The High Republic: Tears of the Nameless (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Tears of the Nameless'' audiobook]] released.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 9|''Legacy of Vader'' 9]] published.
<noinclude>
